'''Uta S'orn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] who represented [[Belasco/Legends|Belasco]] until her retirement and subsequent arrest in [[43 BBY/Legends|43 BBY]]. Her son, [[Ren S'orn]], was [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]].

Following her retirement, she withdrew to her [[Homeworld/Legends|home planet]] [[Belasco/Legends|Belasco]] where she worked with the [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] [[Jenna Zan Arbor]] who had secretly introduced a virus into the water supply. They planned to create the anti-virus that would save the planet and in doing so, achieve money and fame. However, these plans were foiled by Jedi Masters [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] and Padawans [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Siri Tachi/Legends|Siri Tachi]]. S'orn was subsequently sent to live out her remaining years on a prison planet.
